title: sqlite3_uri_boolean defaults to true, documented as false, is a mess
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id SERIAL PRIMARY KEY, name TEXT NOT NULL, is_active BOOLEAN DEFAULT TRUE);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, is_active) VALUES ('Alice', NULL);
INSERT INTO test_table (name, is_active) VALUES ('Bob', FALSE);
SELECT name, is_active FROM test_table WHERE is_active IS NOT NULL;
UPDATE test_table SET is_active = TRUE WHERE id = 1;
